Why Whisper Korea

Not a Tour.
A Personal Experience.

Small groups only

Every tour is intimate — no crowded buses, no rushing.

Real local knowledge

Hidden cafés, local restaurants, and spots the guidebooks miss.

Fully customisable

Don't like something on the itinerary? We change it for you.

Pay on the day

No upfront payment required. Confirm, then pay on site.

"Korea surprised me in every single way — and Whisper Korea made sure I didn't miss any of it."

1 Day · Suwon

Suwon Hwaseong Fortress

  • ④Lunch — local Suwon beef restaurant
  • ⑤Starfield Library — café & shopping
🥩 Suwon beef area 🚉 Seoul Station pickup
DepartsSeoul Station (Story Way)
8:45 AM → returns ~4:30 PM
60€ / person

What's Possible

Everything can be customised

☀

Multi-day itineraries

Plan your entire trip from arrival to departure — we'll map out every day with options and alternatives.

🍽

Dietary & food preferences

Vegetarian, halal, allergies — we make sure every meal stop works for your group.

🚄

Beyond Seoul

Busan, Gyeongju, Jeju — we can arrange transport and guide for trips further afield.

📸

Photo-first routes

Want the best Instagram spots in Seoul? We design routes around golden-hour locations and hidden gems.

🎭

Seasonal events

Cherry blossom season, lantern festivals, summer river concerts — we time your trip around Korea's best moments.

🌙

Evening & night options

Rooftop bars, night markets, Han River evening picnics — Seoul doesn't sleep and neither do our tours.
